examples.text: وَٱصْبِرْ نَفْسَكَ مَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَدَوٰةِ وَٱلْعَشِىِّ يُرِيدُونَ وَجْهَهُۥ ۖ
examples.english: And patiently stick with those who call upon their Lord in early morning and late evening, seeking His pleasure.

senses.gloss: evening, time between sunset and isha
afternoon, latter part of the day

etymology.text: Verbal noun of عَشِيَ (ʕašiya, “to develop poor eyesight especially at night”).
